description: High-capacity English text embedding model (335M params) for semantic similarity.
RoBERTa model fine-tuned on ~124M tweets for sentiment analysis (positive/negative/neutral).
RoBERTa-base fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 for extractive question answering.
Compact RoBERTa model fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 for lightweight question answering.
DINOv2 base self-supervised vision model for general-purpose image feature extraction.
DINOv2 small self-supervised vision model for efficient image feature extraction.
Vision Transformer base pretrained on ImageNet-21k for image feature extraction.
LAION CLIP ViT-B/32 trained on 2B image-text pairs for joint image/text feature extraction.
DINOv2-based vision model fine-tuned on chest X-rays for radiology feature extraction.
CLIP ViT-B/16 model for joint image-text embeddings with 16x16 patch size.
Lightweight sentence embedding model mapping text to 384-dim dense vectors.
Lightweight sentence embedding model optimized for semantic similarity tasks.
